demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heartburn has been terrible for years, but tonight a piece of meat got completely stuck in my chest and it burns like fire. I can't get it down and everything I drink just comes straight back up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The food feels lodged in my lower chest, it won't move, and I'm panicking because I can't swallow properly.

symptom_narrative.onset: the stuck-food sensation started suddenly this evening while I was eating dinner
symptom_narrative.duration: a couple of hours and not letting up
symptom_narrative.character: a burning, gripping pain right behind the breastbone with a feeling that a lump of food is jammed and won't go down
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: one of the worst episodes I've had — very distressing and I feel like I'm choking on it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in the middle-to-lower chest, behind the breastbone
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since dinner, worse when I try to swallow anything
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — I tried sipping water and it comes straight back up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to swallow food or water makes it worse and I bring it back up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: bringing up small amounts of clear spit and the water I drink; a long-standing dry cough at night
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had bad acid reflux for about 15 years and lately food has started catching when I swallow, but it's never been stuck like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't eat or drink anything and I'm pacing around the house because I can't settle

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: acid reflux / heartburn for about 15 years
past_medical_history.how_managed: over-the-counter antacid tablets on and off

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; feeling very anxious about the choking sensation

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an inexpensive home fingertip device

objective_data_offered.value: about 75 kg on my bathroom scales, hasn't changed much that I've noticed
I can still swallow my own spit okay, I'm not drooling — it's just food and drink that won't go down
